composition.visual_hierarchy: The eye is first drawn to the large '$1M' and the percentage increase, then moves down to the line graph to observe the trend over time, primarily following the prominent purple line.
composition.balance: asymmetric - the dynamic lines of the graph create an informal balance against the static, centered text elements.

technical_specs.depth_of_field: deep - all elements are in sharp focus across the digital display.

typography.placement: overlay - main metrics are centered at the top; axis labels are integrated along the left and bottom edges of the graph.

subject_analysis.primary_subject: Financial performance metrics and their trend over time.
subject_analysis.positioning: The main metrics are centered at the top of the image, while the line graph occupies the bottom two-thirds.
subject_analysis.interaction: The two line graphs (solid purple and dotted gray) interact by showing comparative trends over the same time period.

background.spatial_depth: shallow - the background is a flat, uniform white digital canvas.

elements_detailed.position: center - spanning the width of the graph at $0M, $1M, $2M, $3M levels

background.objects_catalog: Gross volume (text, top center), $1M (text, top center), ↑ +93.94% (text, top center), $964K previous period (text, top center), $3M (text, left axis), $2M (text, left axis), $1M (text, left axis), $0M (text, left axis), Mar 1 (text, bottom axis), Mar 22 (text, bottom axis), Solid purple line graph (mid-bottom), Dotted gray line graph (mid-bottom), Horizontal grid lines (background of graph).

prompts: Minimalist UI dashboard design, showing financial gross volume metric, large bold $1M, green percentage increase, line graph with purple solid line and gray dotted line, white background, sans-serif typography, clean data visualization, screenshot style
Modern analytics dashboard snippet, time-series line chart for sales volume, prominent current value and comparison to previous period, light grey grid lines, clear axis labels, flat design
generation_parameters.technical_settings: Digital rendering, vector graphics, high resolution, crisp text, flat design principles.
